QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: Other Investment Products_9

question.text: Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP) doubles the invested amount in approximately:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** KVP doubles the invested amount in 124 months (approximately 10 years and 4 months) at the current interest rate of 7.7% per annum. **The Trap:** 144 months (12 years) would imply a lower interest rate. The 124-month doubling period is calculated based on the Rule of 72 at 7.7%. **Cross-Exam Context:** KVP features are specific to Series XVII. Similar small savings products are briefly covered in Series X-A for financial planning. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** KVP has no tax benefit on investment or returns. Recommend it only for clients who want a guaranteed return without tax-planning needs.
